global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with various shapes and text elements promoting a streaming service.
global.main_message: Promoting exclusive new hits available for order.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A large circular shape in the center, filled with a lighter shade of green.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape in the center, slightly overlapping with the circular shape, also in a lighter shade of green.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular element positioned near the bottom center, filled with a lighter green.

elements.label: Another small circle
elements.description: Another small circular element positioned slightly above the previous one, also in a lighter green.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, black text reading 'Exclusive tonight New hits every week' centered in the middle of the ad.
elements.text_content: Exclusive tonight New hits every week

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'FluxStream' in large, bold font at the top center of the ad, colored in black.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom center with the text 'Order now' in bold, black font.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge at the bottom left corner displaying '-30%' in bold, black font.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag at the top left corner labeled 'UGC' in a simple, black font.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, promoting exclusive new hits.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline in the center, with decorative elements and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Exclusive tonight New hits every week, FluxStream, Order now, -30%, UGC
